{"society_power": 6.5, "state_power": 2.0, "society_change": 5.0, "state_change": -6.0, "key_event": "1979 Islamic Revolution topples the Pahlavi state", "reasoning": "The oil-fueled despotic Leviathan peaked mid-decade (state ~8-9) but a mass revolutionary coalition\u2014bazaar, clergy, students, urban poor\u2014mobilized through mosques and general strikes, ending the decade with society ascendant and the old state collapsed. Scoring the period's end, the monarchy has fallen and central authority is in revolutionary flux, so state power craters while mobilized society surges."}
